query: SELECT o.*, u.email FROM orders o JOIN users u ON u.id = o.user_id WHERE o.status = 'pending' ORDER BY o.created_at DESC
explain:
Sort (cost=12543.22..12793.22 rows=100000 width=128)
  ->  Hash Join (cost=1823.00..7543.00 rows=100000 width=128)
        Hash Cond: (o.user_id = u.id)
        ->  Seq Scan on orders o (cost=0.00..4321.00 rows=100000 width=96)
              Filter: ((status)::text = 'pending')
        ->  Hash (cost=1123.00..1123.00 rows=56000 width=48)
              ->  Seq Scan on users u (cost=0.00..1123.00 rows=56000 width=48)

query: SELECT oi.*, p.name, p.price FROM order_items oi JOIN products p ON p.id = oi.product_id WHERE oi.order_id = ANY($1)
explain:
Hash Join (cost=2.25..98732.00 rows=500000 width=200)
  Hash Cond: (oi.product_id = p.id)
  ->  Seq Scan on order_items oi (cost=0.00..78000.00 rows=500000 width=40)
        Filter: (order_id = ANY ($1))
  ->  Hash (cost=1.50..1.50 rows=60 width=168)
        ->  Seq Scan on products p (cost=0.00..1.50 rows=60 width=168)

query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM audit_logs WHERE user_id = $1 AND created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'
explain:
Aggregate (cost=18432.00..18432.01 rows=1 width=8)
  ->  Index Scan using idx_audit_logs_user_id on audit_logs (cost=0.56..18230.00 rows=80800 width=0)
        Index Cond: (user_id = $1)
        Filter: (created_at > (now() - '30 days'::interval))
